title: URI function is not implemented
description:
Query:
SELECT ?X  FROM <http://localhost:8890/chebi_db> WHERE
{
BIND(URI(<http://www.uochb.org/chebi/1.0/ids/16189>) AS ?X)
}

Leads to error:
Virtuoso 37000 Error SP031: SPARQL compiler: Internal error: Built-in function is not implemented
According to SPARQL 1.1 documentation (http://www.w3.org/TR/sparql11-query/#func-iri):
The URI function is a synonym for IRI.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE chebi_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO chebi_data (id, uri, value) VALUES (1, 'http://www.uochb.org/chebi/1.0/ids/16189', 42.0);
UPDATE chebi_data SET value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chebi_data WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: URI function not implemented in SPARQL query
